Name: PagerDuty - Open Maintenance Window
Description:
Open a new maintenance window for the specified services, using the PagerDuty v2 API.

No new incidents will be created for a service that is currently in maintenance.

This script sets an output variable **WindowId** that can be used in the _PagerDuty - Close Maintenance Window_ template.

Parameters.Name: Minutes
Parameters.Label: Minutes
Parameters.HelpText: Please set an estimated number of minutes for the maintenance window. The maintenance window will remain open for this duration unless it's proactively closed sooner.

Parameters.Name: RequesterId
Parameters.Label: RequesterId
Parameters.HelpText:
Please configure an email address of the user creating the maintenance window.

Example: Octopus@mydomain.com

Parameters.Name: Token
Parameters.Label: Token
Parameters.HelpText:
Please supply the API token of your PagerDuty instance.

Found here: https://mydomain.pagerduty.com/api_keys

Parameters.Name: Description
Parameters.Label: Description
Parameters.HelpText: Please supply a short description for this maintenance window.

Parameters.Name: ServiceIds
Parameters.Label: ServiceIds
Parameters.HelpText:
Please supply a comma separated list of the PagerDuty service ids that will be included in this maintenance window.

Found here: https://mydomain.pagerduty.com/services/**ABC123**

Example: ABC123, ABC456

Parameters.Name: Subdomain
Parameters.Label: Subdomain
Parameters.HelpText:
The subdomain of the PagerDuty instance.

Found here: https://**mydomain**.pagerduty.com/
